lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was wondering if you could repair my pouches.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Cordelia
lines.text: I need 25 abyssal pearls to unlock the contact with the mage who knows how to repair a pouch. After the contact has been unlocked, it will cost you 1 abyssal pearl each time to repair the pouches.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have enough abyssal pearls for that, I'm afraid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Cordelia
lines.text: Now bear with me whilst I contact the mage.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Cordelia
lines.text: Hello, can you hear me?

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Quiet! Why do you all try to break my concentration?

lines.speaker: Apprentice Cordelia
lines.text: OK. The contact has been set up.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Cordelia
lines.text: It will cost you 1 abyssal pearl to repair the pouches.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was wondering if you could repair my pouches.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Cordelia
lines.text: It will cost you 1 abyssal pearl to repair the pouches.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have enough abyssal pearls for that, I'm afraid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, that sounds fair.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Cordelia
lines.text: You don't seem to have any pouches in need of repair.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Cordelia
lines.text: Bear with me whilst I make the contact for repairing the pouches.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Cordelia
lines.text: Hi, it's me again.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Cordelia
lines.text: Hello, I know you can hear me.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Cordelia
lines.text: Ding Dong, Ding Dong. You can't keep me waiting.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Fine. What do you want?

lines.speaker: Apprentice Cordelia
lines.text: I got someone here in need of a pouch repair.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: OK...It's done.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Cordelia
lines.text: Your pouches have been repaired.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Cordelia
lines.text: We need to assemble rift guardian before those creatures arrive!

lines.speaker: Apprentice Cordelia
lines.text: We need shield barriers up before anything comes through that rift!

lines.speaker: Apprentice Cordelia
lines.text: We need to protect the Great Guardian!

lines.speaker: Apprentice Cordelia
lines.text: We need to power up the Great Guardian!

lines.speaker: Apprentice Cordelia
lines.text: We need more rift guardians!
